calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-11-2026 Set For Trial On Aug-31-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-12-2026 Continued To Feb-25-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-26-2025 Continued To Feb-03-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-05-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances
Thomas Purtell, Esq. for Plaintiff Alba Abarca
Alexander Nguyen, Esq. for Defendant Maritza Pinel- Tronoff and Craig Tronoff

in re DEFENDANT MARITZA PINEL-TRONOFF AN INDIVIDUAL, CRAIG TRONOFF DEMURRER to COMPLAINT;

Hearing held.

Defendant request that the tentative ruling is re-examined and for more time to submit additional documentation in support of the demurrer of defendant.

Plaintiff submits on the tentative.

After considering the arguments, the court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT MARITZA PINEL-TRONOFF AN INDIVIDUAL, CRAIG TRONOFF DEMURRER to COMPLAINT;

is OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Moving party failed to show that this 2025 action is barred by res judicata or fails to state facts sufficient to constitute a cause of action.

Prevailing Party to submit proposed order that is in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b).

Judge: Anthony A. Trendacosta; Clerk: K. Valdes; Not Reported. (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-08-2025 Set For Order To Show Cause On Dec-16-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-07-2025 Continued To Nov-05-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
